## ERT1.2. En route capacity incentive scheme {#ert1.2.-en-route-capacity-incentive-scheme .Heading-2-ER}

The FABEC NSAs report that the overall FABEC incentive target for en route ATFM delays, due to CRSTMP causes only, was set at 0.42 mins/flight. The NSAs report an achieved CRSTMP FABEC performance of 1.14 mins/flight using data from the ansperformance.eu dashboard including post ops adjustments.

\[NB The attribution of original delay causes on the ansperformance.eu dashboard is unverified\]

The failure to achieve the overall FABEC incentive target means that no individual ANSP qualifies for bonuses, regardless of the specific local target. However, individual ANSPs can still face a financial penalty associated with the local performance.
